channel.title: GoldPrices — Live Gold Price Updates
channel.description: Live gold prices for UAE, GCC and the Arab world. 24K, 22K, 21K, 18K per gram and per ounce. Updated every 90 seconds.

item.title: Track Live Gold Prices — GCC & Arab World
item.description: GoldPrices tracks live XAU/USD spot price and converts to 24+ currencies across the GCC and Arab world. 7 karats (24K to 14K), updated every 90 seconds. Free, bilingual English/Arabic.

item.title: Free Gold Calculator — Value, Scrap, Zakat & Buying Power
item.description: Calculate the value of your gold by weight and karat, estimate scrap gold prices, compute Zakat on gold holdings, and find your buying power at live spot rates.

item.title: Gold Shops Directory — GCC & Arab World
item.description: Browse a curated directory of gold shops and souqs across UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Egypt and more. Filter by region, country, city, and specialty.

item.title: How to Buy Gold — Complete Buyer's Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to buying gold in GCC markets: understanding karats, making charges, how to verify authenticity, where to buy, and a pre-purchase checklist.

item.title: The AED–USD Fixed Peg Explained — Why UAE Gold Prices Are Stable
item.description: The UAE Dirham has been pegged to the US Dollar at 3.6725 since 1997. Learn how this peg works, why it makes UAE one of the most price-stable gold markets, and what it means for your gold purchases.

item.title: 24K vs 22K Gold: Which Is the Better Buy?
item.description: Compare 24K (99.9% pure) and 22K (91.7% pure) gold. Learn which karat is better for investment vs jewellery, how prices differ, and what to look for when buying in UAE and GCC markets.

item.title: When Do Gold Markets Open? A GCC Gold Trading Hours Guide
item.description: Gold trades 23.5 hours a day, Sunday through Friday. Learn when GCC gold markets open, peak liquidity windows, and why London and New York overlap matters for UAE buyers.

item.title: Gold Karat Comparison Guide: 24K, 22K, 21K, 18K, 14K Explained
item.description: Compare all gold karats side by side: purity percentages, price differences, uses, and durability. Understand which karat is right for investment, jewellery, or gifting in GCC markets.

item.title: Zakat on Gold: How to Calculate What You Owe
item.description: Complete guide to Zakat on gold. Learn the nisab threshold, how to value gold holdings, whether jewellery is zakatable, and how to use our Zakat calculator for accurate calculations.

item.title: How to Invest in Gold in the GCC: A Practical Guide
item.description: A complete guide to investing in gold in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, and Oman. Compare physical gold, ETFs, digital gold, and gold savings accounts available in GCC markets.

item.title: Gold Price Today in UAE — Live AED Rates
item.description: Live gold prices in UAE. 24K, 22K, 21K, 18K per gram in AED. Updated every 90 seconds. Includes Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and all Emirates city rates.

item.title: Gold Price Today in Saudi Arabia — Live SAR Rates
item.description: Live gold prices in Saudi Arabia. 24K, 22K, 21K, 18K per gram in SAR. Includes Riyadh, Jeddah, Mecca, Medina, and Dammam city rates. Updated every 90 seconds.

item.title: Gold Price History & Charts — 30 Days to 5 Years
item.description: Interactive gold price history charts spanning 30 days to 5 years. View ATH, ATL, YTD performance, karat comparisons, and download historical data in CSV format.

item.title: Learn About Gold — Karats, Pricing, Zakat, History
item.description: Learn everything about gold: karat grades, how prices are set, the AED peg, Zakat rules, hallmarking, and the history of gold in the Arab world. Bilingual English/Arabic.
